narrative:
Shortcreek Township has 735 registered voters, with 55.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.9%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.2 percentage points.
